hero.subhead: Green Gate MENA connects youth with climate opportunities, environmental networks, and programs across the Arab region and beyond — one trusted regional platform, built by youth, for youth.

partners.heading: Building the green ecosystem
partners.description: Green Gate MENA works alongside UN agencies, regional institutions, NGOs, and private sector leaders to connect MENA's green actors and amplify collective impact.

contact.heading: Let's build the green
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
contact.heroSubhead: Questions, partnership inquiries, media requests, or just want to say hello — we're here.
contact.responseTimeValue: We typically respond within 2–3 business days.
contact.thankYou: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 2–3 business days.
contact.subjectPlaceholder: e.g. Partnership inquiry / Media request / General question
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.validName: Name must be at least 2 characters
contact.validMessage: Message must be at least 20 characters
contact.faq1Q: Is Green Gate MENA free to use?
contact.faq1A: Yes — completely free. Browsing opportunities, joining the community, listing your NGO, and submitting opportunities are all free. We are sustained by partner support and grants.
contact.faq2A: Our team reviews every submitted opportunity before it goes live. We verify the organization's legitimacy, check the link, and confirm the opportunity is relevant to the MENA region.
contact.faq3Q: Can I submit an opportunity from outside MENA?
contact.faq3A: Yes, as long as the opportunity is open to applicants from at least one MENA country. Many of our listed opportunities are from international organizations targeting Arab youth.
contact.faq4Q: How long does it take to get a directory listing approved?
contact.faq4A: We review directory applications within 5 business days. You'll receive an email confirmation once your profile is live.
contact.faq5A: Yes. Our platform is fully bilingual (Arabic/English). Many of our resources are available in Arabic, and our team communicates in both languages.
contact.faq6Q: How can my company sponsor Green Gate MENA?
contact.faq6A: We'd love to hear from you. Use the contact form or visit our For Businesses page to learn about sponsorship and partnership opportunities.

about.heroSubhead: Green Gate MENA is a youth-led platform connecting the region's climate actors — youth, NGOs, consultants, and businesses — through one trusted digital ecosystem.
about.missionP1: The MENA region is home to some of the world's most climate-vulnerable countries and some of its most ambitious youth. Yet the opportunities, networks, and resources they need are scattered across dozens of websites, languages, and institutions.
about.missionP2: Green Gate MENA was founded in 2022 to change that. We aggregate fellowships, grants, events, and programs from across the globe — and make them searchable, accessible, and actionable for Arabic-speaking youth and organizations.
about.value1Desc: Founded by Arab youth for Arab youth. Every decision is shaped by the people on the ground who live and breathe the MENA green transition.
about.value2Desc: From Morocco to Oman, from the Mediterranean coast to the Arabian Peninsula — we build connections across the entire 22-country region, in Arabic and English.
about.value3Desc: We don't just list opportunities — we build the connective tissue between youth, NGOs, institutions, and businesses so the green ecosystem grows together.
about.value4Desc: Free to join, free to submit, free to learn. We believe every young person in MENA deserves equal access to the green economy, regardless of country or background.
about.teamSubhead: Our team is fully distributed across MENA — because the issues we tackle are regional, and so are the people who understand them best.

impactPage.heroSubhead: Since 2022, Green Gate MENA has connected hundreds of Arab youth with life-changing opportunities. These are some of their stories.
impactPage.ctaSubhead: Join a growing community of Arab youth, organizations, and leaders building the green future of MENA — one opportunity at a time.

servicesYouth.heroSubhead: Green Gate MENA aggregates every fellowship, grant, internship, and training program relevant to Arab youth — so you spend less time searching and more time growing.
servicesYouth.ctaSubhead: Join 500+ Arab youth already finding opportunities, building networks, and shaping the region's sustainable future.
servicesYouth.offering1Desc: Curated fellowships from UNEP, UNDP, YALI, Atlantic Council, and 50+ funders — filtered for MENA eligibility and updated weekly.
servicesYouth.offering2Desc: Training programs, workshops, and bootcamps on climate policy, green finance, sustainable entrepreneurship, and environmental science.
servicesYouth.offering3Desc: Connect with climate professionals across MENA who have been in your shoes — and can help you navigate your green career path.
servicesYouth.offering4Desc: Opportunities to attend COP, UN sessions, and regional summits — with support for delegation prep, side events, and advocacy campaigns.

servicesNGOs.heroSubhead: Green Gate MENA helps environmental NGOs reach youth audiences, connect with partner organizations, and access funding opportunities across the Arab region.
servicesNGOs.ctaSubhead: Join 20+ NGOs already listed in our directory and reaching thousands of engaged Arab youth every month.
servicesNGOs.offering1Desc: Connect with NGOs, institutions, and funders across 22 MENA countries. Our directory and partnership matching program accelerates regional collaboration.
servicesNGOs.offering2Desc: Access frameworks, toolkits, and expert consultants to design climate programs that are regionally contextualised and internationally fundable.
servicesNGOs.offering3Desc: We connect NGOs with regional and international funders — from the Green Climate Fund and Arab development banks to bilateral donors and private foundations.
servicesNGOs.offering4Desc: Templates and guidance for environmental impact reporting aligned with international standards — GRI, SDGs, and funder-specific frameworks.
servicesNGOs.reason1: Reach 500+ youth members actively looking for NGO programs
servicesNGOs.reason2: List your opportunities and events on the MENA green ecosystem platform
servicesNGOs.reason3: Connect with sister organizations in other MENA countries
servicesNGOs.reason4: Co-host regional webinars and capacity-building workshops
servicesNGOs.reason5: Access our consultant network for technical project support
servicesNGOs.reason6: Get featured in our Knowledge & Blog section

servicesConsultants.heroSubhead: Connect with organizations that need your expertise. Green Gate MENA links qualified sustainability consultants with project opportunities across 22 Arab countries.
servicesConsultants.ctaSubhead: Join our growing network of sustainability consultants and start connecting with organizations across the Arab world.
servicesConsultants.offering1Desc: Access a curated pipeline of sustainability consulting projects from NGOs, governments, and development banks across the 22-country region — matched to your expertise.
servicesConsultants.offering2Desc: Get discovered by organizations looking for environmental consultants. Your verified profile reaches 500+ community members and partner institutions.
servicesConsultants.offering3Desc: Join multi-disciplinary consulting teams. Green Gate MENA facilitates project consortiums for larger assignments requiring diverse technical expertise.
servicesConsultants.offering4Desc: Publish articles and insights in our Knowledge & Blog section. Build your reputation as a regional climate authority and attract inbound client inquiries.
servicesConsultants.step1Desc: List your expertise, languages, countries of experience, and project portfolio on our verified directory.
servicesConsultants.step2Desc: NGOs, institutions, and development agencies search our directory for qualified consultants. Your profile does the work.
servicesConsultants.step3Desc: We facilitate introductions and, for consortium projects, help assemble the right team. You focus on the work.

servicesBusinesses.heroSubhead: Partner with Green Gate MENA to advance your ESG agenda, recruit green talent, and build authentic regional credibility in the Arab sustainability space.
servicesBusinesses.audienceSubhead: Our community spans 22 MENA countries and reaches engaged sustainability professionals through our platform, newsletter, social media, and events.
servicesBusinesses.ctaSubhead: Contact our partnerships team to explore how your organization can make a meaningful impact across the MENA region.
servicesBusinesses.offering1Desc: Co-design environmental programs with Green Gate MENA that advance your ESG commitments and create measurable impact across the Arab world.
servicesBusinesses.offering2Desc: Recruit from 500+ vetted youth in our community — engineers, analysts, policy experts, and communicators passionate about sustainability.
servicesBusinesses.offering3Desc: Sponsor our events, newsletters, and knowledge content to reach MENA's most engaged green audience — youth, NGOs, and institutions combined.
servicesBusinesses.offering4Desc: Co-fund or co-brand regional programs: fellowships, hackathons, research grants, and community campaigns — all verified and impact-tracked.

joinYouth.heroSubhead: Free to join. Be part of the fastest-growing Arab youth climate network in MENA.
joinYouth.benefitsHeading: What you get as a member
joinYouth.benefit1: Access our full curated database of 32+ opportunities
joinYouth.benefit2: Receive a weekly digest of new fellowships and grants
joinYouth.benefit3: Connect with 500+ Arab youth in the green economy
joinYouth.benefit4: Get mentorship from climate professionals across MENA
joinYouth.benefit5: Be first to hear about GreenX 2026 and regional events
joinYouth.benefit6: Access Arabic-language guides and training resources
joinYouth.freeNote: Membership is and will always be free. Green Gate MENA is built by youth, for youth — no paywalls, no premium tiers.
joinYouth.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your background and what you're hoping to find on Green Gate MENA...

joinNGOs.heroSubhead: Join 20+ verified organizations already connecting with Arab youth through Green Gate MENA.
joinNGOs.benefitsHeading: Why list on Green Gate MENA
joinNGOs.benefit1: Get your NGO listed on our verified directory
joinNGOs.benefit2: Reach 500+ active Arab youth looking for NGO programs
joinNGOs.benefit3: Publish your opportunities and events on the platform
joinNGOs.benefit4: Connect with partner organizations across 22 countries
joinNGOs.benefit5: Access our consultant network for technical project support
joinNGOs.reviewNote: Applications are reviewed within 5 business days. We verify organization legitimacy and alignment with our green mission before listing.
joinNGOs.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your NGO's mission and the programs you offer...

joinConsultants.heroSubhead: Join our verified network of sustainability experts and connect with projects across 22 MENA countries.
joinConsultants.benefit1: Verified profile in our regional sustainability consultant directory
joinConsultants.benefit2: Access to project opportunities from NGOs and development banks
joinConsultants.benefit3: Invitations to join multi-disciplinary consulting consortiums
joinConsultants.benefit4: Publish thought leadership content in our Knowledge & Blog
joinConsultants.benefit5: Networking with 30+ partner organizations across MENA
joinConsultants.benefit6: Priority access to Green Gate MENA events and roundtables
joinConsultants.whoNote: Environmental consultants, policy advisors, technical specialists, and researchers with experience in the MENA region. Both Arabic and international experts welcome.
joinConsultants.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your expertise and areas of specialization...

joinPartners.heroSubhead: Join UNEP, UNDP, GIZ, WWF, and 25+ organizations already partnering with Green Gate MENA to advance the regional green economy.
joinPartners.benefit2: Co-brand regional programs and events with Green Gate MENA
joinPartners.benefit3: Access our youth community for recruitment and engagement
joinPartners.benefit4: Featured partner placement on platform, newsletter, and events
joinPartners.benefit5: Annual impact reporting on your partnership outcomes
joinPartners.benefit6: Invitation to partner advisory roundtable sessions

joinPartners.track2Desc: Organizations co-funding or co-designing youth programs, fellowships, and events.
joinPartners.track3Desc: Publications and media outlets amplifying Green Gate MENA content and reach.
joinPartners.track4Desc: Youth networks and civil society organizations cross-promoting opportunities.
